caseStudy.overview: A comprehensive overview of the project, explaining the context and scope of work.
objectives: Create engaging video content that tells a compelling story
Showcase product features in an accessible way
Drive audience engagement across social platforms
caseStudy.challenge: Describe the main challenge or problem that needed to be solved.
caseStudy.approach: Detail your strategic approach to solving the problem.
caseStudy.solution: Describe the final solution and how it addressed the objectives.
